name: list
description: Styled ordered and unordered lists with list items
whenToUse: Use UnorderedList for items with no required order. Use OrderedList when sequence matters.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for step-by-step procedures — use Steps. Do not nest more than two levels.
example:
<UnorderedList>
  <ListItem>O(1) average case lookup</ListItem>
  <ListItem>O(n) worst case with hash collision</ListItem>
</UnorderedList>
